subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the Tree of the All-Merciful! Praise be to God that from the blessed Tree a tender shoot hath been nourished by the grace of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع رفیع سدره رحمانیه الحمد لله از شجره مبارکه قضیبی رطیب سیراب بفیض رحمان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement
